characters.name: Ainsley Towne
characters.description: Ainsley TowneFull nameAinsley TowneBiographical informationGenderFemaleEthnicityCaucasianHair ColorBlondeEyesBlueStatusAliveMarital statusSingleRelationshipsJohn Frost(ex-boyfriend)Career informationOccupationActressSeries informationFirst seenLast seenDown in a HoleExit StrategiesPortrayed byJessalyn Gilsig Ainsley Towneis an actress who knowsJohn Frostfrom his childhood acting career. She is portrayed byJessalyn Gilsig. She was first introduced inDown in a Holewhen she came into Gaffney looking forDr Frostwho she hadn't seen in 17 years. It is later known that she portrayed Frost's mom in Nick Of Time during his childhood acting career. She came to Chicago for work to film a movie which involves a nurse. To whichMaggieoffers to let her shadow her for a crash course in nursing to which she accepts.

characters.name: Elizabeth Asher
characters.description: Elizabeth AsherFull nameElizabeth AsherNicknameLizzyBiographical informationGenderFemaleEthnicityCaucasianHair ColorBlondeEyesBlueStatusAliveMarital statusSingleFamilyUnnamed fatherUnnamed mother†Hannah Asher(sister)Matt Asher (brother)Unborn daughter†Unborn child(niece)RelationshipsUnnamed ex-girlfriendCareer informationOccupationWaitressAffiliationCozy Corner Restaurant & Pancake HouseSeries informationFirst seenLast seenBroken HeartsDon't You CryPortrayed byErin Anderson Elizabeth Asheris the sister ofDr. Hannah Asher. She is portrayed byErin Anderson. While working, she catches sight of her sister and goes to confront her. Hannah tells Elizabeth that she will not lie for her but will help in another way. Elizabeth is greatly surprised when Hannah gives her a check of $25,000 and tried to decline but Hannah gives her a moving speech of how she always looked out for her and served as a mother figure she never had. After hearing this, a touched Elizabeth embraced her sister.

characters.name: Caitlin Lenox
characters.description: Caitlin LenoxFull nameCaitlin LenoxNicknameCatieCatie CatBiographical informationGenderFemaleEthnicityCaucasianHair ColorBrownEyesBlueStatusAliveFamilyFranklin Lenox (father)†Valerie Lenox (mother)†Kip Lenox(brother)RelationshipsNicholas Hayes(kissed)Unnamed man (fling)Mitch Ripley(boyfriend)Career informationOccupationChief of Emergency MedicineAttending Trauma SurgeonAffiliationGaffney Chicago Medical CenterFormerlyU.S. ArmyDepartmentDepartment of Emergency MedicineSeries informationFirst seenSink or SwimPortrayed bySarah Ramos Catie Cat Unnamed man (fling)Mitch Ripley(boyfriend) Caitlin is extremely strict with rules and regulation, carrying a no-nonsense approach, and has a near obsession with efficiency, suggesting that she may be on the autism spectrum. This was also evidenced by the fact that she knew exactly how to calm an autistic child who was having a meltdown. She was in the Army, giving her a tough personality and problem solving skills. She cares for people but hides it very well. She also mentions that she isn't good with emotion, and that she was very blunt as a child, which she was ostracized for.

characters.name: Caroline Charles
characters.description: Caroline CharlesFull nameCaroline CharlesNicknameCeCeBiographical informationGenderFemaleEthnicityAfrican-AmericanHair ColorBrownEyesBrownStatusDeceasedCause of DeathLymphomaMarital statusMarriedFamilyRobin Charles(daughter)Anna Charles(stepdaughter)Margaret Charles†(mother-in-law)Tommy Charles†(brother-in-law)Matthew Charles(nephew)RelationshipsDaniel Charles(husband)Series informationFirst seenLast seenWe Hold These TruthsI Can't Imagine the FuturePortrayed byPaula Newsome Caroline "CeCe" Charleswas the first and fourth wife ofDaniel Charlesand the mother of their daughterRobin Charles. She was portrayed byPaula Newsome. When CeCe returns to Chicago to participate in a clinical trial in hopes of curing her lymphoma, she reconnects withDanieland they eventually re-marry. She passes away during a final trip to one of their favorite resorts.

characters.name: Cassidy
characters.description: CassidyFull nameCassidyBiographical informationGenderFemaleHair ColorBlackStatusIncarceratedMarital statusWidowedFamilyWendy†(wife)Series informationFirst seenLast seenSink or SwimDon't You CryPortrayed byTiff Abreu Cassidyis a recurring character in the TV showChicago Med. Cassidy's wife Wendy is a victim of a ship sinking.Ms. Goodwinis told to chose between two patients (one being Cassidy's wife, the other being the person who caused the crash) to receive the last blood available.Ms. Goodwinchose the person who caused the crash because he was more likely to benefit, andCaitlin Lenox, the co-head of the emergency department at the time as well as Wendy's doctor agreed. Wendy ended up passing away later that day.

characters.name: Claire Rhodes
characters.description: Claire RhodesFull nameClaire RhodesBiographical informationStatusAliveFamilyMr Rhodes†(grandfather)Cornelius Rhodes†(father)Elizabeth Rhodes†(mother)Connor Rhodes(brother)Career informationOccupationManager atDolan Rhodes Department StoreSeries informationFirst seenLast seenFallbackInheritancePortrayed byChristina Brucato Claire Rhodesis the daughter ofCornelius Rhodesand his late wife Elizabeth. She is the sister ofConnor Rhodes. She was portrayed byChristina Brucato. Claire was born toCornelius Rhodesand his wifeElizabeth, with a brotherConnor Rhodes. When she and her brother were children, their mother threw herself off the roof of their home, although her brother later mentioned there was more to the story that Claire did not know about. Years later,Connorleft for medical school, leaving her alone with their father. This caused Claire to grow bitter towards, and estranged from, her brother.

Years later,Connorleft for medical school, leaving her alone with their father. This caused Claire to grow bitter towards, and estranged from, her brother.

characters.name: Connor Rhodes
characters.description: Connor RhodesFull nameConnor RhodesNicknameDr. Connor Rhodes, Connor, Dr. RhodesBiographical informationGenderMaleEthnicityCaucasianHair ColorBrownEyesBlueStatusAliveMarital statusSingleFamilyCornelius Rhodes†(father)Elizabeth Rhodes†(mother)Claire Rhodes(sister)RelationshipsRobin Charles(ex-girlfriend)Samantha Zanetti(ex-girlfriend)Ava Bekker†(ex-girlfriend)David Downey†(mentor)Career informationOccupationAttending SurgeonAffiliationGaffney Chicago Medical Center(formerly)DepartmentDivision ofCardiothoracic& Trauma Surgery(formerly)Series informationFirst seenLast seenDerailedNever Going Back to NormalPortrayed byColin Donnell Dr.Connor Rhodesis a former Attending Physician in Trauma Surgery and Cardiothoracic Surgery at theGaffney Chicago Medical Center. He was portrayed byColin Donnell. Connor was born in Chicago toCornelius Rhodesand his wifeElizabeth, with a younger sister namedClaire. His family is the very wealthy owner of theDolan Rhodes Department Store, started by Connor's grandfather. When Connor was ten, his mother killed herself by throwing herself off the roof of their home. Although she was severely depressed, Connor always knew there was more to the story, remarking to his father that there are things he knows that he has not told his sister. AfterElizabethdied, Connor leftChicagoand his sister grew bitter towards him for abandoning her and leaving her with their father. Due to his upbringing, Connor initially is seen arrogant, overconfident and somewhat bossy with his fellow doctors. However, Connor is actually more noble and kind than he seems to be. He carries on many scars and feelings from his past that are still unresolved like his estranged relationship with his family after his mother's suicide. This tragic past made Connor a person who never gives up on helping others and does whatever it takes to avoid another tragedy like when he was a child. Connor can be very stubborn and go as far as defying his superiors orders in order to treat a patient.  Despite his stubbornness, Connor is down-to-earth and knows when your actions make terrible consequences, like when he stopped Will from telling a patient about the truth of her treatment se he does not lose his license. He admits that current system pisses him off and often tries his best to no let the system affect others. He is very emotional when it comes about personal relationships. He is very devoted with those he deeply cares for.

characters.name: Crockett Marcel
characters.description: Crockett MarcelFull nameCrockett MarcelNicknameDr. MarcelDarioush Jahanbani (birth name)Biographical informationGenderMaleEthnicityPersianHair ColorBlackEyesBrownStatusAliveMarital statusDivorcedFamilyUnnamed fatherUnnamed motherUnnamed sisterHarper Marcel † (daughter)Unnamed grandmotherRelationshipsClaire(ex-wife)Avery Quinn(fling)Natalie Manning(ex-girlfriend)Pamela Blake(ex-girlfriend)Career informationOccupationAttending PhysicianMember of the BoardAffiliationFormerlyGaffney Chicago Medical CenterDepartmentDepartment of SurgerySeries informationFirst seenLast seenNever Going Back to NormalI Think I Know You, But Do I Really?Portrayed byDominic Rains Dr.Crockett Marcel(bornDarioush Jahanbani) is a former attending physician in General Surgery and member of the board atGaffney Chicago Medical Center. He was portrayed byDominic Rains. Crockett started out as a hard-partying southern doctor who is a skilled surgeon, but wasn't always one to follow rules. He was occasionally seen keeping a bottle of alcohol in his hospital locker, as well as liberally indulging in alcohol at parties. He somewhat came down to earth after opening up to his co-workers about the untimely death of his young daughter Harper.
